progress.durable_improvement: Added deny-by-default GitHub OIDC claim authorization that binds a cryptographically verified claim set to the accepted Cloudflare workflow invocation receipt.
progress.verification: Five deterministic Node tests passed locally: exact claims accepted; wrong audience, expiry, lookalike workflow identity, and rejected context receipt denied.

blocker: The protected cloudflare-research environment still requires CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN before the deployment workflow can return and verify a Pages URL.
handoff: Wire GitHub OIDC token acquisition, Frontier R-007 metadata retrieval, R-006 signature verification, this claim authorizer, and a protected replay ledger before final evidence acceptance. Then dispatch the Cloudflare deployment workflow.
non_overwrite_guarantee: This append-only queue update does not mutate operations/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json or another team's records.
